title: Make Live Register projections history-complete
goal: Separate bounded raw-history display from complete current-state projection so active focus, overrides, candidates and conflicts remain visible after unrelated history growth.

acceptance.assertion: Current thread focus, focus override and candidate state is derived from complete event coverage rather than the displayed history window.
live-list, context, repo context and conflict reports expose coverage_complete, history_truncated, oldest_loaded_event_id and projection_source.
Conflict reporting emits a blocker whenever current-state projection coverage is incomplete.
what-now and repo-balls retain older active focus and candidate state without treating it as queue or claim authority.
Deterministic tests exceed 100 events and cover complete projection plus fail-closed incomplete coverage.

metadata.source: Bureau total audit and Truth Model v2 design
metadata.outcome: Implemented and postflight-verified in Bureau PR #447: Live Register operational projections now derive current state from complete event coverage while raw history remains bounded for display. Coverage and truncation are explicit, and incomplete conflict coverage fails closed.
validation: Bureau PR #447 GitHub CI passed validate (3.10) and validate (3.12).
Local Ruff over src and tests passed.
The complete local pytest suite passed.
Focused Live Register and v2 tests passed 97 tests.
Post-merge Bureau check was valid with state-store integrity ok.
Post-merge Doctor and Registry Truth were healthy with zero errors.
Live state-store smoke covered 191 events with a 50-event display window and retained active event 36.

verified_acceptance.complete-projection: live-list, live_register_context, repo context and live-conflicts derive active focus, overrides and candidate state from one complete ordered event snapshot rather than the bounded display window.
verified_acceptance.coverage-signals: Responses expose coverage_complete, history_truncated, oldest_loaded_event_id and projection_source; the live postflight reported complete_event_scan with complete coverage and truncated history.
verified_acceptance.fail-closed-conflicts: live-conflicts emits live-register-projection-incomplete as a blocker whenever projection coverage is false; regression coverage proves the refusal path.
verified_acceptance.consumer-parity: what-now and repo-balls retained active event 36 and complete candidate state while preserving Live Register non-claims and adding no queue or claim authority.
verified_acceptance.tests: Regression tests exceed 100 events, verify one-snapshot projection and fail-closed incomplete coverage; full local tests and CI 3.10/3.12 passed.
